creator: db@db.net
text:
On Wed, Jan 10, 2007 at 07:10:28AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of math/py-numpy,
>
> Please note that PR ports/107729 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/107729

I approve the patch. It passes tinderbox and runs.

- Diane
